sentences.target: Ich brauche einen Löffel für die Suppe.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈbʁaʊ̯xə ˈaɪ̯nən ˈlœfl̩ fyːɐ̯ diː ˈzʊpə./

translations.de: Ich brauche einen Löffel für die Suppe.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈbʁaʊ̯xə ˈaɪ̯nən ˈlœfl̩ fyːɐ̯ diː ˈzʊpə./
translations.en: I need a spoon for the soup.
translations.es: Necesito una cuchara para la sopa.
translations.fr: J’ai besoin d’une cuillère pour la soupe.
translations.it: Ho bisogno di un cucchiaio per la zuppa.
translations.zh-Hans: 我需要一把勺子来喝汤。
translations.yue: 我需要一隻湯匙嚟飲湯。
translations.pt: Preciso de uma colher para a sopa.
translations.tr: Çorba için bir kaşığa ihtiyacım var.
translations.vi: Tôi cần một cái muỗng để ăn súp.
translations.nl: Ik heb een lepel nodig voor de soep.
translations.hi: मुझे सूप के लिए एक चम्मच चाहिए।
translations.el: Χρειάζομαι ένα κουτάλι για τη σούπα.
translations.nb: Jeg trenger en skje til suppa.
translations.sv: Jag behöver en sked till soppan.
translations.ro: Am nevoie de o lingură pentru supă.
translations.da: Jeg har brug for en ske til suppen.
translations.ja: スープ用のスプーンが必要です。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; selects an accusative direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine accusative singular; determiner marking the direct object.
Common noun, masculine; head of the object noun phrase governed by the verb.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces a PP indicating purpose/recipient.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner of the noun 'Suppe'.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'für'.

translations.en: The spoon falls off the table.
translations.es: La cuchara se cae de la mesa.
translations.fr: La cuillère tombe de la table.
translations.zh-Hans: 勺子从桌子上掉了下来。
translations.nl: De lepel valt van de tafel.
translations.hi: चम्मच मेज़ से गिर जाता है।
translations.el: Το κουτάλι πέφτει από το τραπέζι.
translations.ja: スプーンがテーブルから落ちる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine nominative singular; determiner of the subject noun.
Common noun, masculine; subject of the clause.
Intransitive main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes a PP expressing source.
Contracted preposition 'von' + article 'dem' (von dem); governs dative; introduces source.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'vom' in dative case.

sentences.target: Ich wasche den Löffel gleich ab.

translations.de: Ich wasche den Löffel gleich ab.
translations.en: I’ll wash the spoon in a moment.
translations.es: En un momento lavo la cuchara.
translations.fr: Je vais laver la cuillère dans un instant.
translations.it: Tra un attimo lavo il cucchiaio.
translations.pt: Daqui a pouco lavo a colher.
translations.he: עוד רגע אני שוטף את הכף.
translations.vi: Tôi sẽ rửa cái muỗng một lát nữa.
translations.nl: Ik ga zo de lepel afwassen.
translations.hi: मैं थोड़ी देर में चम्मच धो दूँगा।
translations.el: Σε λίγο θα πλύνω το κουτάλι.
translations.id: Sebentar lagi saya akan mencuci sendok.
translations.ja: すぐスプーンを洗います。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; separable verb whose prefix appears later.
Definite article, masculine accusative singular; determiner marking the direct object.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of the verb.
Adverb of time; modifies the verb indicating immediacy.
Separable verb particle; combines with 'wasche' to form the verb 'abwaschen'.

sentences.target: Sie rührt mit dem Löffel im Topf.
sentences.reading: /ziː ʁyːɐ̯t mɪt deːm ˈlœfl̩ ɪm tɔpf./

translations.de: Sie rührt mit dem Löffel im Topf.
translations.ipa: /ziː ʁyːɐ̯t mɪt deːm ˈlœfl̩ ɪm tɔpf./
translations.en: She stirs with the spoon in the pot.
translations.es: Ella remueve la olla con una cuchara.
translations.fr: Elle remue la marmite avec une cuillère.
translations.it: Lei mescola nella pentola con un cucchiaio.
translations.yue: 佢用湯匙喺煲入面攪拌。
translations.pt: Ela mexe na panela com uma colher.
translations.vi: Cô ấy dùng muỗng khuấy trong nồi.
translations.nl: Ze roert in de pan met een lepel.
translations.hi: वह पतीले में चम्मच से हिला रही है।
translations.el: Ανακατεύει στην κατσαρόλα με ένα κουτάλι.
translations.nb: Hun rører i gryta med en skje.
translations.id: Dia mengaduk di panci dengan sendok.
translations.sv: Hon rör i grytan med en sked.
translations.ro: Ea amestecă în oală cu o lingură.
translations.da: Hun rører i gryden med en ske.
translations.ja: 彼女は鍋の中をスプーンでかき混ぜる。
